PUPPET_FILE
  PsiPuppetFunctionCallExpressionImpl(FUNCTION_CALL_EXPRESSION)
    PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(NAME)('foo')
    PsiPuppetParenthesizedExpressionsListBlockImpl(PARENTHESIZED_EXPRESSIONS_LIST_BLOCK)
      PsiElement(()('(')
      PsiErrorElement:'*' unexpected
        PsiElement(*)('*')
      PsiElement($)('$')
      PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('args')
      PsiElement())(')')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
  PsiPuppetFunctionCallExpressionImpl(FUNCTION_CALL_EXPRESSION)
    PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(NAME)('foo')
    PsiPuppetParenthesizedExpressionsListBlockImpl(PARENTHESIZED_EXPRESSIONS_LIST_BLOCK)
      PsiElement(()('(')
      PsiErrorElement:'*' unexpected
        PsiElement(*)('*')
      PsiElement([)('[')
      PsiElement(INTEGER_LITERAL_WITHOUTQ)('1')
      PsiElement(,)(',')
      PsiElement(INTEGER_LITERAL_WITHOUTQ)('2')
      PsiElement(,)(',')
      PsiElement(INTEGER_LITERAL_WITHOUTQ)('3')
      PsiElement(])(']')
      PsiElement())(')')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
  Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
    PsiElement($)('$')
    PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('a')
  PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
  PsiErrorElement:'=' unexpected
    PsiElement(=)('=')
  PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
  PsiElement(*)('*')
  PsiPuppetExpressionMultiplicativeImpl(EXPRESSION_MULTIPLICATIVE)
    PsiPuppetExpressionAdditiveImpl(EXPRESSION_ADDITIVE)
      Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
        PsiElement($)('$')
        PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('b')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      PsiElement(+)('+')
      PsiErrorElement:<expression> expected, got '*'
        <empty list>
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiElement(*)('*')
    Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
      PsiElement($)('$')
      PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('c')
